use_cases: Displaying success confirmation after completing actions like form submissions or file saves
Notifying users that a process completed successfully with optional dismiss functionality
Providing brief, non-blocking feedback within application workflows
ai_summary: A minimalist success toast notification component that displays a green checkmark icon with a title and description message. Features a close button with a subtle scale animation on click for dismissal. Built with clean Tailwind styling featuring a white background, gray text hierarchy, and thin border. Suitable for any SaaS or application requiring lightweight user feedback on successful operations.
